LAB 5: SPECIAL SENSES HUMAN ANATOMY LAB MANUAL 63

64 MALGOSIA WILK-BLASZCZAK

LAB 5: SPECIAL SENSES MEASURABLE OUTCOMES • Explain the function of each special sense. • Identify all of the provided anatomical structures of the special senses on available models. • Determine the pathways of vision, hearing, balance, taste, and olfaction. • Correctly identify the histology slides and the structures that can be differentiated on each. • Determine the structures of the dissected eye. • Demonstra
